option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.3.2</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.babak</groupId> <artifactId>stock-mvc-api</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>stock-mvc-api</name> <description>Demo project for Spring Boot</description> <properties> <java.version>17</java.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.h2database</groupId> <artifactId>h2</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>1.18.30</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Use springdoc (compatible with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.1.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> <exclusions> <exclusion> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> </exclusion> </exclusions> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.google.guava</groupId> <artifactId>guava</artifactId> <version>32.1.2-jre</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- Ensure Lombok annotation processing during compilation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <release>17</release> <fork>true</fork> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>1.18.30</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.3.2</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.babak</groupId> <artifactId>stock-mvc-api</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>stock-mvc-api</name> <description>Demo project for Spring Boot</description> <properties> <java.version>17</java.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.h2database</groupId> <artifactId>h2</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>1.18.30</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Use springdoc (compatible with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.1.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> <exclusions> <exclusion> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> </exclusion> </exclusions> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>junit</groupId> <artifactId>junit</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.google.guava</groupId> <artifactId>guava</artifactId> <version>32.1.2-jre</version> </dependency> <!-- Compatibility shim for libraries referencing javax.servlet until all are migrated to Jakarta --> <dependency> <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId> <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId> <version>4.0.1</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- Ensure Lombok annotation processing during compilation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <release>17</release> <fork>true</fork> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>1.18.30</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: # This file was converted to application.yml # See application.yml for datasource and JPA configuration # Kept intentionally empty to avoid overriding application.yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM node:lts
WORKDIR /app
ENV PATH /app/node_modules/.bin:$PATH
COPY . /app/
RUN npm install
# copy production folder to app folder COPY build /app
# start node CMD serve -s build

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM node:18-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /app
# Install dependencies COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./ RUN npm ci --silent || npm install --silent
# Copy source and build COPY . . RUN npm run build
# Production image FROM nginx:stable-alpine
COPY --from=build /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html
# Expose port and run nginx EXPOSE 80 CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "stock-ui", "version": "0.1.0", "private": true, "dependencies": { "axios": "^0.21.1", "node-sass": "^4.14.1", "react": "^16.13.1", "react-dom": "^16.13.1", "react-redux": "^7.2.1", "react-scripts": "3.4.3", "redux": "^4.0.5", "serve": "^11.3.2", "sweetalert2": "^9.17.1", "sweetalert2-react-content": "^3.0.3" }, "scripts": { "dev": "react-scripts start", "start": "serve -s build", "build": "react-scripts build", "test": "react-scripts test", "eject": "react-scripts eject", "heroku-postbuild": "npm run build" }, "eslintConfig": { "extends": "react-app" }, "browserslist": { "production": [ ">0.2%", "not dead", "not op_mini all" ], "development": [ "last 1 chrome version", "last 1 firefox version", "last 1 safari version" ] }, "devDependencies": { "enzyme": "^3.11.0", "enzyme-adapter-react-16": "^1.15.3", "jest-enzyme": "^7.1.2", "redux-devtools": "^3.6.1", "redux-devtools-extension": "^2.13.8" } }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
""" Sweep Autocomplete Tutorial """
""" ==================== Autocomplete ==================== Press tab ⇥ to accept or esc ⎋ to reject suggestions. """ class Priority(): LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH = "low", "medium", "high"
def assign_task_as_high(task): task.priority =
def assign_task_as_medium(task): # tab to change "medium" -> Priority.MEDIUM task.priority = "medium"
def assign_task_as_low(task): task.priority = "low" # same here
# ———————————————————— Learn more at https://docs.sweep.dev ——————————————— # # ———————————————————— Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/sweep ——————————————— #
# You're done! This file is in the tmp directory and will automatically be cleaned up. Happy coding!

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
""" Sweep Autocomplete Tutorial """
""" ==================== Autocomplete ==================== Press tab ⇥ to accept or esc ⎋ to reject suggestions. """ class Priority: LOW = "low" MEDIUM = "medium" HIGH = "high"
def assign_task_as_high(task): task.priority = Priority.HIGH
def assign_task_as_medium(task): # tab to change "medium" -> Priority.MEDIUM task.priority = Priority.MEDIUM
def assign_task_as_low(task): task.priority = Priority.LOW
# ———————————————————— Learn more at https://docs.sweep.dev ——————————————— # # ———————————————————— Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/sweep ——————————————— #
# You're done! This file is in the tmp directory and will automatically be cleaned up. Happy coding!
